description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 12, 2025 at 9:08 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a fixed object (cement parking deck for the level above) in an underground parking lot at 1160 Mission Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was entering a parking stall of an underground parking lot at 1160 Mission Street at a low rate of speed when the sensor 
mounted on the roof of the Waymo AV made contact with the cement parking deck for the level above. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage. 
Print
Clear Form
